boundary: Goal1062 prepares one batched rerun plan for the remaining blocked NVIDIA RTX wording rows. It does not run cloud, create resources, authorize release, or authorize public speedup wording.
global_preconditions: Run only from an already-running RTX-class NVIDIA pod checkout.
Build the OptiX backend from the checked-out commit before commands.
Copy the whole report directory back before stopping or terminating the pod.
Do not use this manifest to authorize public wording without a later artifact-intake and 2+ AI review.
goal: Goal1062 blocked RTX wording rerun manifest

rows.current_public_wording_boundary: The prepared service-coverage decision sub-path is a real RT-core path and Goal1058 validated oracle parity, but no bounded public speedup wording is authorized until a separate timing/baseline review accepts it.
rows.purpose: Reconfirm oracle parity for the prepared facility service-coverage decision path.
rows.scale_note: Small validation scale; this row is not intended to satisfy the 100 ms timing floor.

rows.current_public_wording_boundary: The prepared service-coverage decision sub-path is a real RT-core path and Goal1058 validated oracle parity, but no bounded public speedup wording is authorized until a separate timing/baseline review accepts it.
rows.purpose: Collect a claim-review timing repeat large enough to test the 100 ms floor.
rows.scale_note: Large timing run; validation is intentionally separated into the validation row to avoid O(N) oracle cost during timing.

rows.current_public_wording_boundary: The prepared ray/triangle any-hit pose-flag path is a real RT-core path and Goal1058 validated oracle parity, but public speedup wording remains blocked until 100 ms timing-floor and baseline evidence are reviewed.
rows.purpose: Reconfirm oracle parity for the prepared ray/triangle any-hit pose-flag path.
rows.scale_note: Small validation scale using python_objects + pose_flags because packed pose_count mode intentionally rejects oracle validation.

rows.current_public_wording_boundary: The prepared ray/triangle any-hit pose-flag path is a real RT-core path and Goal1058 validated oracle parity, but public speedup wording remains blocked until 100 ms timing-floor and baseline evidence are reviewed.
rows.purpose: Collect a claim-review timing repeat large enough to test the 100 ms floor.
rows.scale_note: High-memory timing run: packed_arrays + pose_count avoids Python row/flag materialization; downscale pose-count if VRAM pressure appears.
